responsibilities: Develop and optimize semiconductor fabrication processes including deposition, etch, and photolithography steps for wafer manufacturing.
Monitor process performance using statistical process control (SPC) charts to detect drift and maintain process capability.
Conduct yield analysis and root-cause investigations to identify and resolve sources of wafer defects and process excursions.
Design and execute experiments (DOE) to characterize process windows and optimize critical process parameters.
Collaborate with equipment engineers to qualify new process tools and integrate them into production fabrication lines.
Perform process integration across multiple fabrication steps to ensure compatibility and achieve target device performance.
Analyze metrology and inspection data from KLA and other tools to validate process control and specification compliance.
Support advanced node process development including FinFET, EUV lithography, and high-k metal gate technologies.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives using Six Sigma methodologies to reduce cycle time and improve fab throughput.
Document process flows, specifications, and control plans to support technology transfer and production ramp.
